nasb.text: the master of that slave will come on a day when he does not expect him and at an hour which he does not know,

esv.text: the master of that servant will come on a day when he does not expect him and at an hour he does not know

cnv.text: 在他想不到的日子，不知道的時間，那僕人的主人要來，

ccb.text: 主人会在他想不到的日子、不知道的时辰回来，

csbs.text: 那么，这奴仆的主人就要在意想不到的日子、在他不知道的时刻回来，
